caption: In a brightly lit indoor setting, a man with a distinctive grey, pointed hairstyle and glasses sits behind a professional microphone. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, thin yellow suspenders, and a patterned bow tie, and he wears black over-ear headphones. He is smiling and looking toward someone off-camera. In the background, a woman with pink hair, wearing a green dress, stands near a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." A framed picture of a person and a logo featuring a shield are also visible on the wall. Red and white on-screen text reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "BOSS PODCAST." Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a similar position, maintaining his smile and engaged expression while slightly shifting his head and posture as he speaks.
